trimWhitespace.description: Removes leading and trailing whitespace and newlines.

flattenMultiline.description: Joins multi-line shell commands into a single line.

stripShellPrompts.description: Removes $ and # prompts from terminal commands.

removeBoxDrawing.description: Removes box-drawing characters from terminal output.

repairWrappedURL.description: Repairs URLs broken across multiple lines.

quotePathsWithSpaces.description: Wraps file paths with spaces in double quotes.

regexReplace.description: Replace text matching a regex pattern. Configure in the Regex tab.

normalizeQuotes.description: Replaces typographic quotes (“”‘’) with ASCII quotes.

dedent.description: Removes common leading indentation from all lines.

joinParagraphs.exampleInput:
This is a long
wrapped line.
joinParagraphs.exampleOutput: This is a long wrapped line.

collapseBlankLines.description: Collapses multiple blank lines into one.

uniqueLines.description: Removes duplicate lines, keeping first occurrence.

escapeJSON.description: Escapes quotes, newlines and backslashes for JSON strings.

unescapeJSON.description: Unescapes JSON string back to readable text.

escapeShell.description: Wraps text in single quotes for safe shell usage.

urlEncode.description: Percent-encodes text for URL query parameters.

prettyJSON.description: Formats JSON with indentation for readability.

minifyJSON.description: Compresses JSON to a single line.

htmlToMarkdown.description: Converts HTML tags to Markdown syntax.

stripTrackingParams.description: Removes utm_*, fbclid, gclid and other tracking params from URLs.

extractURLs.description: Extracts all URLs and emails from text.

collapseMultilineBash.description: Detects a known shell command and collapses multi-line text into a single line.
